status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.

features.title: Rewrite harness-engineering from scratch based on walkinglabs
features.user_visible_behavior: Harness-engineering skill follows the walkinglabs 5-subsystem model (Instructions, Environment, State, Scope, Verification) with 6 sub-skills (bootstrap, session, feature, verify, review, diagnose). All old references deleted. New references: five-subsystems.md, diagnostic-loop.md, minimal-pack.md, session-lifecycle.md, verification-pipeline.md, scope-control.md.

All 6 reference files exist under skills/harness-engineering/references/ (five-subsystems.md, diagnostic-loop.md, minimal-pack.md, session-lifecycle.md, verification-pipeline.md, scope-control.md)
None of the 7 old references exist (doc-first.md, hooks.md, repo-system.md, session-discipline.md, task-management.md, verification.md, workflow.md)
plugin.json autoDiscovery.skills includes all 7 harness-engineering skill paths

features.title: Rewrite code-quality with sub-skills
features.user_visible_behavior: Code-quality skill acts as a router with 5 sub-skills: review (independent review agent), audit (design principle audit), fix (known fix patterns), python (Python rules), rust (Rust rules). Main SKILL.md lists all 16 principles and 13 patterns, then routes to sub-skills.
verification: skills/code-quality/SKILL.md frontmatter name is 'code-quality' and description mentions sub-skills
All 5 sub-skill directories exist with SKILL.md (review, audit, fix, python, rust)
skills/code-quality/SKILL.md lists exactly 16 design principles
Cross-file counts are consistent: code-quality:review SKILL.md and references/review-agent.md both reference the same total item count (27)
plugin.json autoDiscovery.skills includes all 6 code-quality skill paths
features.notes: Sub-skill files created but cross-file number inconsistencies found. Blocked by harness-rewrite completion.

features.title: Clean up project files and align everything

No unused code or files.
